name: 2pk Wave Medium Decorative Basket Mint Green - Brightroom™
description:
Keep everyday essentials handy with this 2-Pack of Wave Medium Baskets from Brightroom™. Made from polypropylene, these wave medium baskets have a square shape that makes them ideal for storing throw blankets, pillows, toys and more. The open tops allow you to quickly and easily see what's inside, and cutout side handles allow for easy transport from room to room.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
